problem:
Let $x, y, z$ be real numbers so that  \begin{align*}
y+z & = 13, \\
z+x & = 14, \\
x+y & = 15.
\end{align*} Find $\sqrt{xyz(x+y+z)}$.

classified_questions.question: Can you describe the first step you would take to solve this system of equations?
